context: Tests whether the agent gives current Core ML model deployment guidance for large app assets without stale ODR or cellular-download claims.

checklist.name: Background Assets default
checklist.description: Prefers Background Assets for new large or updateable model assets and frames On-Demand Resources as legacy or existing-project guidance.

checklist.name: No stale size rules
checklist.description: Does not repeat a blanket 200 MB cellular download limit or a rule that models over 50 MB must use ODR.

checklist.name: App Store caveats
checklist.description: Mentions checking current App Store Connect size limits or gives iOS/iPadOS 18+ thinned app bundle and ODR asset-pack limits with appropriate caveats.

checklist.name: Compiled model handling
checklist.description: Recommends precompiled `.mlmodelc` assets where possible, compile-once caching for downloaded models, and physical-device memory/performance validation.

checklist.name: Background compute guidance
checklist.description: Softens `.cpuOnly` or background-inference guidance to policy, contention, thermal, energy, and legitimate background-mode constraints instead of claiming GPU or Neural Engine are categorically unavailable.
